CREATE TABLE events (event_time TIMESTAMP, description VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO events VALUES (TIMESTAMP '1992-01-01 20:38:40', 'New Year Celebration');
SELECT strftime(event_time, '%a, %-d %B %Y - %I:%M:%S %p') FROM events WHERE event_time < TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01';
SELECT description, strftime(event_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') AS formatted_time FROM events WHERE event_time > TIMESTAMP '1990-01-01' ORDER BY event_time DESC;
WITH formatted_events AS (SELECT event_time, strftime(event_time, '%A') AS day_name FROM events) SELECT day_name, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM formatted_events GROUP BY day_name;
CREATE TABLE log_entries (log_time TIMESTAMP, log_message VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO log_entries VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-11 15:45:00', 'User logged in');
SELECT le.log_message, strftime(le.log_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') AS formatted_log_time FROM log_entries le JOIN events e ON le.log_time > e.event_time WHERE e.description = 'Conference Start';
